strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS CDK in production at Optilyz
Current hands-on AI agent development at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — directly matches a required skill
Deep testing culture: TDD/pairing/trunk-based at RIDE, authored test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for this role
No Kotlin and only light Java evidence (robotic arms at Altom); JD lists Kotlin/Java for select backend services
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not named on resume — testing depth is evident but in other ecosystems (DLang, Selenium)

key_factors.factor: AI agent development (MCP, agentic tooling) at current role

response.justification: The role's core competencies are TypeScript/Node fullstack delivery, React, testing expertise, cloud/containerization, and AI agent development. The candidate shows direct evidence for nearly all: TypeScript/React/MongoDB/AWS CDK on a high-volume mailing platform at Optilyz, Kubernetes deployment of his GISCollective platform, a strong verifiable testing pedigree (TDD at RIDE, authored test tooling, Selenium instruction), and current MCP/agent-infrastructure work at re:cinq satisfying the AI agent requirement. He holds a CS bachelor's degree and far exceeds the 6+ years bar. Gaps are framework-specific rather than fundamental: Nest.js is absent, Kotlin is absent with only minor Java evidence, and Vitest is not named — all learnable given his demonstrated polyglot range (D, C++, Swift, PHP, Java). Evidence supports a strong recommendation with minor stack-adjacency discount.
